IP type       HW type     Flags       HW address            Mask     Device
192.168.1.1   0x1         0x2         aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:01     *        eth0
192.168.1.2   0x1         0x2         aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:02     *        eth0
192.168.1.3   0x1         0x0         00:00:00:00:00:00     *        eth0
192.168.1.10  0x1         0x2         11:22:33:44:55:66     *        eth0
10.0.0.1      0x1         0x2         de:ad:be:ef:ca:fe     *        wlan0
